title: WebToNative Platform
description: Redesigned and migrated a user-based platform to a multi-tenant architecture for 10K+ clients. Improved conversion rates by 30% and onboarding efficiency by 25%.

title: API Migration System
description: Successfully migrated 300+ Express.js APIs with Firestore to a scalable NestJS architecture with MongoDB, improving code maintainability and backend performance.

title: RBAC Admin Dashboard
description: Implemented a role-based access control (RBAC) system for granular permission management, boosting platform security and operational efficiency.

title: Cypress Automation Workflow
description: Built an automation workflow to extract App Store rejection reasons and auto-prefill admin dashboards, reducing publishing effort by 70%.

title: Credit & Referral Rewards
description: Developed a platform credit and referral rewards system, driving a 10% increase in new user sign-ups through improved user engagement.
